name: claude-provenance
description: WarrantOS reference implementation. A stdlib-first governance harness for AI-assisted writing: claim provenance, context admissibility, CBOM v0.2, four-state verdict (PASS/HOLD/BLOCK/NOT_ASSESSABLE), structured human-override ledger, and an explicit per-layer conformance dashboard. MCP server, Claude Code Stop hook, and a shadow observer for read-only beta deployment are included.
